zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Alice Isabella Fereby於大約1452年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾時，她的父親Thomas Fereby29歲，母親Agnes33歲。她於1480年與Sir Humphrey Coningsby結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1498年在英國英格蘭賀特福爾阿爾登哈姆享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Alice Isabella Fereby于大约1452年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Thomas Fereby29岁，母亲Agnes33岁。她于1480年与Sir Humphrey Coningsby结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1498年在英国英格兰賀特福爾阿爾登哈姆享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fereby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: possibly a variant of Friby, a habitational name from either of two places in Yorkshire: Firby in Westow or Firby in Bedale.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Alice Isabella Fereby was born about 1452, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Fereby, was 29 and her mother, Agnes, was 33. She married Sir Humphrey Coningsby in 1480. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1498, in Aldenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Alice Isabella Fereby est née environ 1452, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Fereby, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Humphrey Coningsby en 1480. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1498, à Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Alice Isabella Fereby um 1452 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fereby 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes 33. Sie hat 1480 Sir Humphrey Coningsby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1498 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Aldenham, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Alice Isabella Fereby è nata il circa 1452 nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Fereby, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Sir Humphrey Coningsby nel 1480. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1498, nel Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Anna Alice Isabella Ferebyが約1452年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas Ferebyは29歳，母Agnesは33歳であった。1480年にSir Humphrey Coningsbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1498年にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアアルデンハムで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Alice Isabella Fereby(이)가 대략 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fereby(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1480년 Sir Humphrey Coningsby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 알데함에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Alice Isabella Fereby nasceu aproximadamente 1452, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Fereby, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Humphrey Coningsby em 1480. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1498, em Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Alice Isabella Fereby родилась около 1452 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Fereby было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Humphrey Coningsby в 1480 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1498 г. в местности алденам, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Alice Isabella Fereby nació aproximadamente 1452, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Fereby, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Sir Humphrey Coningsby en 1480. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1498, en Aldenham, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
